texts.orig: Package V3 Brief
texts.text: Package V3 Brief

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 1. Package Overview
texts.text: 1. Package Overview

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Package: Klang Valley East Metro Line - Package V3
texts.text: Package: Klang Valley East Metro Line - Package V3

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Parent programme: Klang Valley East Metro Line
texts.text: Parent programme: Klang Valley East Metro Line

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Employer: Klang Valley Transit Authority
texts.text: Employer: Klang Valley Transit Authority

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Main contractor: Gamuda Infra Rail Sdn. Bhd.
texts.text: Main contractor: Gamuda Infra Rail Sdn. Bhd.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Delivery model: Design & Build
texts.text: Delivery model: Design & Build

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Contract value at award: RM 1.280 billion
texts.text: Contract value at award: RM 1.280 billion

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Contract duration: 36 months
texts.text: Contract duration: 36 months

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Baseline commencement date: 01 Jul 2025
texts.text: Baseline commencement date: 01 Jul 2025

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Baseline completion date: 30 Jun 2028
texts.text: Baseline completion date: 30 Jun 2028

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Package route length: 8.4 km
texts.text: Package route length: 8.4 km

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Package limits: CH 11+200 to CH 19+600
texts.text: Package limits: CH 11+200 to CH 19+600

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Stations within package: Pandan Gateway Station and Cheras North Station
texts.text: Stations within package: Pandan Gateway Station and Cheras North Station

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Package V3 is one of the elevated civil and interface packages under the Klang Valley East Metro Line programme. The package covers the section from the eastern side of Ampang Central through Pandan Gateway Station and Cheras North Station , terminating west of Bandar Midah .
texts.text: Package V3 is one of the elevated civil and interface packages under the Klang Valley East Metro Line programme. The package covers the section from the eastern side of Ampang Central through Pandan Gateway Station and Cheras North Station , terminating west of Bandar Midah .

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The corridor passes through a dense urban environment characterised by constrained road reserves, live utility corridors, mixed commercial frontage, and several high-volume junctions. In addition to permanent civil delivery, the package carries significant interface obligations to support later systems access and line-wide integration.
texts.text: The corridor passes through a dense urban environment characterised by constrained road reserves, live utility corridors, mixed commercial frontage, and several high-volume junctions. In addition to permanent civil delivery, the package carries significant interface obligations to support later systems access and line-wide integration.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Package V3 is considered one of the more delivery-sensitive sections of the programme because it combines highvisibility station works, constrained traffic interfaces, and corridor conditions that can materially affect later systems access. Progress within V3 has a direct influence on the readiness of downstream rail systems activities and therefore carries programme-level significance beyond its own civil footprint.
texts.text: Package V3 is considered one of the more delivery-sensitive sections of the programme because it combines highvisibility station works, constrained traffic interfaces, and corridor conditions that can materially affect later systems access. Progress within V3 has a direct influence on the readiness of downstream rail systems activities and therefore carries programme-level significance beyond its own civil footprint.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2. Package Scope
texts.text: 2. Package Scope

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The package scope includes:
texts.text: The package scope includes:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 8.4 km elevated viaduct including bored piles, pile caps, piers, pier caps, segmental launching, parapets, guideway drainage, and associated permanent civil works
texts.text: 8.4 km elevated viaduct including bored piles, pile caps, piers, pier caps, segmental launching, parapets, guideway drainage, and associated permanent civil works

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Pandan Gateway Station , an elevated urban station with interchange provision, concourse retail shell, and two main entrances integrated with existing roadside circulation
texts.text: Pandan Gateway Station , an elevated urban station with interchange provision, concourse retail shell, and two main entrances integrated with existing roadside circulation

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Cheras North Station , an elevated local access station with park-and-ride connection, plant rooms, and provision for future feeder interchange enhancement
texts.text: Cheras North Station , an elevated local access station with park-and-ride connection, plant rooms, and provision for future feeder interchange enhancement

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: utility diversion, protection, and reinstatement works affecting water, telecom, power, and drainage assets within the package corridor
texts.text: utility diversion, protection, and reinstatement works affecting water, telecom, power, and drainage assets within the package corridor

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: temporary traffic management, decking, diversions, hoarding, and access maintenance for active urban roads
texts.text: temporary traffic management, decking, diversions, hoarding, and access maintenance for active urban roads

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: design coordination and physical interfaces for signalling, traction power, telecoms, SCADA, and M&E packages
texts.text: design coordination and physical interfaces for signalling, traction power, telecoms, SCADA, and M&E packages

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: handover readiness for systems contractor access, equipment rooms, cable routes, and later testing and commissioning activities
texts.text: handover readiness for systems contractor access, equipment rooms, cable routes, and later testing and commissioning activities

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: environmental mitigation, stakeholder coordination, and construction-phase public access management along the corridor
texts.text: environmental mitigation, stakeholder coordination, and construction-phase public access management along the corridor

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Within the package, Pandan Gateway Station is the principal interchange-sensitive location, while Cheras North Station is the principal utility- and access-constrained location. These two stations drive a substantial proportion of the package's interface risk and short-term sequencing decisions.
texts.text: Within the package, Pandan Gateway Station is the principal interchange-sensitive location, while Cheras North Station is the principal utility- and access-constrained location. These two stations drive a substantial proportion of the package's interface risk and short-term sequencing decisions.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 3. Package Objectives
texts.text: 3. Package Objectives

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The package has four principal objectives:
texts.text: The package has four principal objectives:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. deliver the elevated civil structure safely and to specification
texts.text: deliver the elevated civil structure safely and to specification

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. complete Pandan Gateway Station and Cheras North Station to the required structural, architectural, and accessreadiness stage
texts.text: complete Pandan Gateway Station and Cheras North Station to the required structural, architectural, and accessreadiness stage

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. achieve interface readiness for downstream rail systems installation
texts.text: achieve interface readiness for downstream rail systems installation

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. maintain delivery performance within approved time and cost tolerances while protecting safety, quality, and stakeholder obligations
texts.text: maintain delivery performance within approved time and cost tolerances while protecting safety, quality, and stakeholder obligations

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Successful delivery of Package V3 is also necessary to protect the wider programme's interface dates for systems design freeze, access handover, and subsequent installation readiness.
texts.text: Successful delivery of Package V3 is also necessary to protect the wider programme's interface dates for systems design freeze, access handover, and subsequent installation readiness.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 4. Delivery Constraints
texts.text: 4. Delivery Constraints

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The package is governed by several material constraints:
texts.text: The package is governed by several material constraints:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: limited night working windows at selected junctions
texts.text: limited night working windows at selected junctions

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: congested utility corridors near Cheras North Station
texts.text: congested utility corridors near Cheras North Station

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: phased traffic diversion requirements at Pandan Gateway
texts.text: phased traffic diversion requirements at Pandan Gateway

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: dependency on timely interface sign-off with the line-wide systems package
texts.text: dependency on timely interface sign-off with the line-wide systems package

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: constrained laydown and crane operating zones in built-up commercial areas
texts.text: constrained laydown and crane operating zones in built-up commercial areas

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The package therefore requires tighter-than-average coordination between civil, traffic, utility, and systems stakeholders when compared with less constrained sections of the line.
texts.text: The package therefore requires tighter-than-average coordination between civil, traffic, utility, and systems stakeholders when compared with less constrained sections of the line.

texts.text: systems interface reviews progress in planned batches without prolonged approval cycles

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 8. Baseline Risk Themes
texts.text: 8. Baseline Risk Themes

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The baseline risk profile for Package V3 includes:
texts.text: The baseline risk profile for Package V3 includes:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: utility authority approvals and access restrictions
texts.text: utility authority approvals and access restrictions

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: unknown underground services and incomplete as-built records
texts.text: unknown underground services and incomplete as-built records

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: traffic management constraints in dense urban corridors
texts.text: traffic management constraints in dense urban corridors

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: interface lag between civil and systems design packages
texts.text: interface lag between civil and systems design packages

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: supply chain dependency for precast segments and temporary works
texts.text: supply chain dependency for precast segments and temporary works

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: stakeholder complaints affecting working windows
texts.text: stakeholder complaints affecting working windows

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: changes to employer requirements after design development
texts.text: changes to employer requirements after design development

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Of these, utility release, traffic staging, and systems interface timing are treated as the primary control risks because slippage in any of these areas can rapidly affect both civil productivity and downstream access dates.
texts.text: Of these, utility release, traffic staging, and systems interface timing are treated as the primary control risks because slippage in any of these areas can rapidly affect both civil productivity and downstream access dates.
